data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies navigation by minimizing user choices to reduce decision time.
data.technical_spec: Designs with curated playlists and featured collections.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs focus on making critical buttons and features easily reachable to enhance usability.
data.technical_spec: Strategically placed playback controls and intuitive navigation icons.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: An aesthetically pleasing interface is used, which enhances perceptions of usability.
data.technical_spec: Implements a clean, modern design with vibrant album artwork.

data.title: Millers Law
data.description: Interfaces are crafted to avoid cognitive overload by grouping information into manageable chunks.
data.technical_spec: Playlists and playlists categories organized logically.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Uses familiar design patterns to align with user expectations based on past experiences.
data.technical_spec: Employs standard UI/UX elements similar to popular music apps.
